programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A Richland County, S.C., vehicle pursuit ends in a rollover crash, as a deputy manages to subdue the suspect and save a baby at the same time; officers in El Paso, Texas find someone they know in the back seat of a car; a man in Walton County, Fla., shares his views with officers about the President, his hatred of domestic violence, and how he once got a trespassing charge at a gas station.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge is convicted of a felony and dragged from the courtroom; a man attempts to escape from a courthouse after being told he's headed to prison; a defendant pays a heavy price for a profanity-laced tirade aimed at a judge.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: An inmate accused of murder makes a daring escape attempt; the judge has harsh words for a woman who pretended to have cancer as part of a scam; a man found guilty of DWI shows up 18 minutes late for his sentencing and then interrupts the hearing.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: The mother of a man on trial for murder gets caught taking a picture of the jury; a defendant is held in contempt of court after flipping off the judge, twice; a judge chastises a disgraced estate attorney and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A grieving father asks the judge for leniency for his son who's been convicted of murdering his other son; a senior citizen spends the night in jail after continually interrupting the judge; a grieving man is removed from the courtroom.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A grieving father is removed from the courtroom for cursing at his daughter's killer; a man accused of violating his parole by drinking alcohol claims he absorbed it from aftershave; a defendant breaks down crying when the judge denies her bond.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering his own family decides to defend himself and cross-examine his own son; things get tense between a judge and a public defender; a surprising act of forgiveness.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Courtroom chaos ensues during an all out brawl; a bailiff risks life and limb diving down a flight of stairs chasing an escapee; a defendant threatens a judge's life.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: After police discover dead bodies inside a home, a high-stakes fugitive search explodes across state lines; every heart-racing moment is captured in real-time through the raw, unflinching lens of body cameras, revealing a relentless pursuit and a killer who will stop at nothing to escape justice.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: When officers in suburban Indiana respond to a potential kidnapping and murder scene, body cam captures every tense moment of the standoff with the suspect. Then in rural Colorado, a chilling investigation unfolds on camera after a mother makes a gruesome discovery in her teenage son's room. As every second ticks by, each crime unravels in real time.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: After a frantic 911 call, EMTs and sheriff's deputies rush to save the life of a mother who suddenly stopped breathing; a tense scene unfolds in real time when her partner refuses to cooperate with police; through the lenses of bodycams, every critical moment unfolds as deputies rush to discover what happened.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: When a college student goes missing in suburban Georgia, a bloody discovery triggers an explosive manhunt and a dramatic chase for the truth; every moment is presented through the raw lens of bodycam as the chilling details of the case unfold in real time.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: When a woman is stabbed in broad daylight in suburban Michigan, officers launch a manhunt to apprehend the attacker before they strike again.

programme.title: Predator Hunters

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: A predator sharing pornography with a minor triggers a game of cat-and-mouse with Tony's team; then, an undercover FBI operation identifies a man who's targeting a 10-year-old; Tony takes down a predator with twisted role-play fantasies.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a predator makes a chilling request to a mom, Det. Godwin partners with the FBI to stop his sick plan. Then, a sex offender's social media signals he's looking to commit a new crime. A pre-dawn raid exposes an online pedophile ring.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
